subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One calleth out from the precincts of the Prison, and summoneth all, for the sake of God, unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم از شطر سجن ندا مینماید و کل را لوجه الله بافق اعلی دعوت میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
